evidence_summary: Establish the rocky hill as a physical barrier and introduce the hammer_heads as a lethal threat via their projectile head combat style.

The travelers attempt to scale a rocky hill but are intercepted by the armless Hammer-Heads. The creatures use their projectile heads to knock the Scarecrow and the Lion down the slope, demonstrating their unique combat style.
Travelers are actively climbing the incline with determination.
Characters are scattered or falling down the slope in terror.
The travelers ascend the hill until intercepted by hammer_heads launching their heads as projectiles.
